purpose: FLW MED (bw7ac7zmr): the 209 raw-agreement rows may carry a SHARED Audiveris error (raw==engraving but both wrong). This logs their verification STATUS, stratified — NOT a clearance. Court of record = Jon (A4).
rule: A raw-agreement row rests on a SINGLE OMR read (Audiveris). It is NOT independently verified. No binding verdict is written for these rows (FLW HIGH).
intended_independent_signal: lida-baritone-printed-manifest.mjs PRINTED_BARITONE_AUDIT_MEASURES (a human page-read) + a future Lead printed manifest. BLOCKER (found 2026-06-25): the printed-manifest uses a DIFFERENT measure numbering than the engraving (it omits the inserted held/restored bars), so build-baritone-score-health printed-audit FAILs at manifest-m9/m18/m31 are likely NUMBERING ARTIFACTS, not engraving errors. Reconciling the 4 numberings (engraving / source / printed-manifest / lock-packet PAGE_MAP) is the named NEXT deterministic step (Codex HIGH: lock the staff/measure/row mapping).
decision: Provisional. These rows enter Jon's A4 holistic read on Audiveris's single read; the per-note independent cross-check (printed-manifest) is pending numbering reconciliation. Vision sampling on dense crops was REJECTED as the independent signal (3x demonstrated unreliable: m5/m21/m29 two-eye scatter).
